name: Gryphon Minerals Ltd
description: Gryphon Minerals Ltd was an Australian-based mineral exploration and development company focused on gold projects in West Africa. The company's flagship asset was the Banfora Gold Project in Burkina Faso, which is a multi-million ounce gold discovery. Gryphon Minerals also held interests in other highly prospective gold and base metal projects in Mauritania and Cote d'Ivoire. In 2016, the company was acquired by Teranga Gold Corporation.
